items.title: Nigeria halts Christian pilgrimages to Holy Land over Middle East conflict
items.dek: NCPC say the measure is necessary to prioritise the "safety and comfort" of Nigerian pilgrims.
items.body: NCPC say the measure is necessary to prioritise the "safety and comfort" of Nigerian pilgrims.

items.title: Higher tariffs likely this week, says US Treasury
items.dek: Scott Bessent says that "likely sometime this week" the US will increase its global tariff on imports from the existing 10%.
